messages.subject: [R-jobs] Open Position at the Barcelona Supercomputing Center | R data analysis tools developer
messages.subject_clean: [R-jobs] Open Position at the Barcelona Supercomputing Center | R data analysis tools developer
messages.body_plain:
Hello,

The Barcelona Supercomputing Center - Centro Nacional de 
Supercomputaci?n in Spain is looking for an R developer to:

- Coordinate developments of Department R tools, in close relation with 
the users, giving them the appropriate support with the use of them 
within a High-Performance Computing environment.
- Contribute to the deployment and installation of the packages in the 
shared department environment.
- Contribute to the ongoing strategy for the development of the Earth 
Sciences Department tools.

You can find more details on the position and instructions for how to 
apply at https://www.bsc.es/join-us/job-opportunities/10526eseddre2

Best,

-- 

Victoria Agudetse Roures
Research Engineer
Computational Earth Sciences Group | Earth Sciences Department
Barcelona Supercomputing Center - Centro Nacional de Supercomputaci?n
Address: C/ Pla?a d'Eusebi G?ell, 1-3, 08034 Barcelona | Main Building, 
Ground Floor
Email: victoria.agudetse at bsc.es

	[[alternative HTML version deleted]]
